title: Photo download progress as image alpha
design_brief: Image opacity increases as bytes download.
mobile_reasoning: Track download progress; map to opacity.

title: Why and when to use useTransition
design_brief: useTransition for low-priority state updates that may cause expensive re-renders.
mobile_reasoning: React 18 concurrent feature; lets you defer heavy renders.

title: Slide-down on top of screen reveals notifications
design_brief: In-app pull-down from top edge reveals notification panel.
mobile_reasoning: Edge pan from top with activeOffsetY threshold.

title: Conditional sheet content based on auth state
design_brief: Sheet shows login form if logged out, content if logged in.
mobile_reasoning: Conditional render inside sheet body.

title: FlashList with virtualization disabled for short lists
design_brief: Lists with < 20 items may benefit from non-virtualized rendering.
mobile_reasoning: Short lists: ScrollView + map. Heuristic threshold.

title: Floating label input
design_brief: Label sits inside input; floats up when focused or filled. Reference: Material text fields.
mobile_reasoning: Label position interpolated from focused or hasValue.

title: Modal route with form that updates underlying list
design_brief: Open modal to create item; on close, list reflects new item.
mobile_reasoning: Modal returns data via router params or context.

title: List row that pulses when new
design_brief: Newly added list rows pulse briefly to draw attention.
mobile_reasoning: On mount, background color flashes then fades.

title: Shadow that blurs based on Y position (drop shadow proxy)
design_brief: Item with shadow that gets longer/blurrier when lifted.
mobile_reasoning: Skia BlurMask scaled by lift value.
performance_notes: Skia blur cheap at small radii.

title: Custom video controls with seek bar
design_brief: Video player with custom seek bar (Skia-rendered).
mobile_reasoning: Reuse Slider with custom display + video.seek.

title: Geofence with entry/exit notifications
design_brief: App schedules notification when user enters/exits a geofence.
mobile_reasoning: expo-location startGeofencingAsync with TaskManager.

title: Box plot for distribution
design_brief: Box plot showing quartiles and outliers.
mobile_reasoning: Skia rect + whiskers + dots.

title: Frosted glass card on photo background
design_brief: Card with frosted glass effect over photo. Reference: iOS Music album view.
mobile_reasoning: BlurView on iOS only; solid on Android.

title: Universal copy menu on long-press text
design_brief: Long-press text → system copy/select menu.
mobile_reasoning: Text component selectable=true.

title: Increased tap target wrapping small icons
design_brief: Wrap visually small icons in larger tappable area via hitSlop.
mobile_reasoning: hitSlop on Pressable.
interaction_details: Easy to tap even when icon is small

title: useMemo for derived expensive data
design_brief: Memoize derived state to avoid recomputation.
mobile_reasoning: useMemo with proper deps.

title: Image annotation history (undo)
design_brief: Photo annotation undo stack.
mobile_reasoning: Push paths to stack; undo pops.

title: Map with location-aware quick actions
design_brief: Bottom toolbar with 'Search nearby', 'Get directions', 'Save' that adapts to current map center.
mobile_reasoning: Toolbar above map; actions consume current region.

title: Stamp 'PAID' style overlay on completed item
design_brief: Item marked complete shows a stamp-like 'PAID' overlay.
mobile_reasoning: Skewed text overlay with spring entrance.
animation_strategy: Stamp impact: scale 1.5→1 with rotation jitter.

title: Animated SVG-style flower bloom
design_brief: Petals open from center.
mobile_reasoning: Per-petal rotation + opacity with stagger.

title: Persistent state across tab switches
design_brief: Each tab maintains its own scroll/state when switching.
mobile_reasoning: Expo Router tabs preserve state by default; ensure no destruct on blur.
solution: // app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx\nimport {Tabs} from 'expo-router';\nexport default function Layout() { return <Tabs screenOptions={{lazy: true, freezeOnBlur: true}}/>; }

title: Sheet that bypasses scroll lock for inner ScrollView
design_brief: Sheet with inner scroll that takes precedence when sheet fully expanded.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Sheet drags when inner should scroll
mobile_reasoning: Inherits rn-002 arbitration.

title: FlashList with frozen header sections
design_brief: Some sections pinned to top regardless of scroll.
mobile_reasoning: stickyHeaderIndices for selected sections only.
solution: // See rn-024 — pass selective indices to stickyHeaderIndices\nimport {FlashList} from '@shopify/flash-list';\nexport function PinnedSections(props: any) { return <FlashList {...props} stickyHeaderIndices={props.pinIndices}/>; }

title: Form with auto-save indicator
design_brief: Form silently auto-saves; shows 'Saved' indicator briefly.
mobile_reasoning: Debounced save + toast.

title: Vote button with animated count change
design_brief: Upvote/downvote count animates with delta.
mobile_reasoning: Reuse rolling digits from rn-186.

title: Animated wireframe globe
design_brief: Rotating wireframe globe.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths approximating meridians + parallels with rotation.

title: Photo metadata edit (caption + tags)
design_brief: Edit caption + tags on a photo before posting.
mobile_reasoning: Combine GrowingTextarea + TagInput.

title: Map with toggleable layers (satellite, terrain)
design_brief: Layer switcher for map types.
mobile_reasoning: Quick action button with mapType prop.

title: Stacked area chart
design_brief: Multiple data series stacked as areas.
mobile_reasoning: Multiple Skia paths layered.

title: Pop art: bold blocks of color, halftone
design_brief: Pop art aesthetic: bold blocks, halftone dots, comic-style.
mobile_reasoning: Bold palette + halftone from rn-298.
